title: Create & Survival Adventure
description: a 1.20 modpack with survival functions and the create mod with extensions.
body:
Create & Survival Adventure is a  modpack where you must survive in the wild. To help you survive, the Create mod helps you automate all sorts of processes.

Minecraft vanilla modpack extensions:

- New Biomes
- New Animals
- Build factories
- Generate electricity
- Survive

This modpack was created by:
**sosengaming**
